message:
Expand stamp container to real window size during hover

The stamp container (1x1 cell) was too small — when the real window
appeared at full size elsewhere, the mouse was no longer over the
container, triggering immediate leave-event and re-hide.

Fix: expand the container to match the real window's size and
position during hover. The container stays reactive (opacity=0) so
leave-event fires when the mouse exits the full-size area, not the
stamp-size area. Clone inside is also resized to match. Both are
restored to original size on leave.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
